creator: grahamperrin@freebsd.org
text:
I lack the knowledge to answer those questions, sorry. 

I should have added that I moved beyond 13.0-CURRENT. Now: 

----

% pkg info -x rust
librsvg2-rust-2.50.3_1
rust-1.50.0
% freebsd-version -kru
14.0-CURRENT
14.0-CURRENT
14.0-CURRENT
% uname -a

% pkg info -x bandwhich
bandwhich-0.20.0_3
